case_title: YUEH, FU SHUN vs. MERITT, RICHARD

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF YUEH, FU SHUN AS TO DEFENDANT MERITT, RICHARD SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUL-06-1993 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-07-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUN-16-1993
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
OSC CALENDAR OF AUG-05-1993, CONTINUED TO OCT-01-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 PLT TO GIVE NOTICE TO DEFT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUL-06-1993, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON JUL-06-1993, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), SANCTION FTA FOR STATUS CONF. & COMPLY WITH COURT RULES. HEARING SET FOR AUG-05-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF YUEH, FU SHUN SERVED APR-20-1993, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MERITT, RICHARD
